data.title: Starbucks Fails At Reversing Declining Sales
data.description: On Wednesday, Starbucks (NASDAQ: SBUX) released preliminary fourth quarter results that fell short of estimates as weak U.S. demand resulted in declines in same store sales, net revenue and profit.

data.title: AI Chatbot Maker Publicly Apologizes After Teen's Death In Florida
data.description: The teen's mother plans to file a lawsuit against Character.AI, accusing the company of having "dangerous and untested" technology.

data.title: Market Clubhouse Morning Memo - October 23rd, 2024 (Trade Strategy For SPY, QQQ, AAPL, MSFT, NVDA, GOOGL, META And TSLA)
data.description: Good Morning Traders! In today's Market Clubhouse Morning Memo, we will discuss SPY, QQQ, AAPL, MSFT, NVDA, GOOGL, META, and TSLA.

data.title: Amphenol CEO Credits 26% Sales Boost To IT, Mobile Networks, Acquisitions: 'We Again Realized Strong Profitability'
data.description: Amphenol expects fiscal 2024 sales of $14.85 billion-$14.95 billion, representing an 18%-19% increase over the prior year.

data.title: Texas Instruments Posts Strong Q3 Results, Joins Valmont Industries, Lithia Motors, Teledyne Technologies And Other Big Stocks Moving Higher On Wednesday
